  "title": "Female Marketer",
  "description": "Omimewos Global Limited is the manufacturer of valour paints.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Marketer

Job Locations: Ota - Ogun / Lagos and Osun / Oyo

About the Role


	One marketer needed to covers ogun state and Lagos state
	Another marketer needed to covers oyo state and osun state


Requirements


	Well-behaved
	Must be ready to meet company Target
	For the marketer in ogun / Lagos must be familiar with Lagos and ogun road ,
	Marketer from Ibadan /osun must be familiar with oyo and osun road.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: valourpaintsnigerialimited@gmail.com using the Job position as the subject of the mail.",

Female Marketer Job at Omimewos Global Limited




        
    

        
        Omimewos Global Limited is the manufacturer of valour paints.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Marketer

Job Locations: Ota - Ogun / Lagos and Osun / Oyo

About the Role


	One marketer needed to covers ogun state and Lagos state
	Another marketer needed to covers oyo state and osun state


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Well-behaved
	Must be ready to meet company Target
	For the marketer in ogun / Lagos must be familiar with Lagos and ogun road ,
	Marketer from Ibadan /osun must be familiar with oyo and osun road.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Operations Manager",
  "description": "TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the QSR sector, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Operations Manager, you will oversee the organization&rsquo;s daily operations, ensuring efficiency, seamless workflow, and high-quality execution across all operational activities while driving productivity and profitability.


Responsibilities


	Oversee and coordinate daily operations to ensure smooth workflow and timely execution of tasks
	Manage staff scheduling, delegation, performance monitoring, and team coordination
	Monitor inventory levels, coordinate with vendors, and ensure operational demands are consistently met
	Prepare operational reports, track performance metrics, and implement process improvements
	Ensure compliance with workplace hygiene, safety, and operational standards


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or related field
	4-6 years of professional experience in operations or administrative management
	Strong leadership, problem-solving, and organizational skills
	Proficiency in operational planning, reporting, and inventory management
	Ability to work efficiently under pressure in fast-paced environments.


Salary
NGN 500,000 &ndash; 650,000 Monthly.",

Operations Manager Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the QSR sector, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Operations Manager, you will oversee the organization’s daily operations, ensuring efficiency, seamless workflow, and high-quality execution across all operational activities while driving productivity and profitability.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee and coordinate daily operations to ensure smooth workflow and timely execution of tasks
	Manage staff scheduling, delegation, performance monitoring, and team coordination
	Monitor inventory levels, coordinate with vendors, and ensure operational demands are consistently met
	Prepare operational reports, track performance metrics, and implement process improvements
	Ensure compliance with workplace hygiene, safety, and operational standards


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or related field
	4-6 years of professional experience in operations or administrative management
	Strong leadership, problem-solving, and organizational skills
	Proficiency in operational planning, reporting, and inventory management
	Ability to work efficiently under pressure in fast-paced environments.


Salary
NGN 500,000 – 650,000 Monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Call Center Supervisor",
  "description": "EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources is a dynamic, multi-sector business dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable solutions across the energy, real estate, and general trading industries. The company specializes in solar energy sales and services, providing sustainable and cost-effective power solutions to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Call Center Supervisor

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for a competent Call center supervisorto organize and direct the staff of our call center.


Responsibilities


	Assist in the formulation of targets for individuals and teams
	Hire and onboard new employees
	Answer questions from staff and provide guidance and feedback
	Anticipate escalation and take over calls when needed
	Devise ways to optimize procedures and keep staff motivated
	Measure performance with key metrics such as call abandonment, calls waiting etc.
	Ensure adherence to policies for attendance, established procedures etc.
	Keep management informed on issues and problems
	Prepare monthly/annual results and performance reports


Requirements


	Experience in customer service is essential
	Proficient in English; Good knowledge of additional languages will be a definite plus
	Working knowledge of MS Office
	Tech savvy with knowledge of telephone equipment and relevant computer programs
	Knowledge of performance evaluation procedures
	Outstanding communication and negotiation abilities
	A results-oriented approach
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills
	Ability to work under pressure


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: integratedresourcesemadorniger@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-26",

  }
}



Call Center Supervisor Job at EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources




        
    

        
        EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources is a dynamic, multi-sector business dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable solutions across the energy, real estate, and general trading industries. The company specializes in solar energy sales and services, providing sustainable and cost-effective power solutions to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Call Center Supervisor

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a competent Call center supervisorto organize and direct the staff of our call center.


Responsibilities


	Assist in the formulation of targets for individuals and teams
	Hire and onboard new employees
	Answer questions from staff and provide guidance and feedback
	Anticipate escalation and take over calls when needed
	Devise ways to optimize procedures and keep staff motivated
	Measure performance with key metrics such as call abandonment, calls waiting etc.
	Ensure adherence to policies for attendance, established procedures etc.
	Keep management informed on issues and problems
	Prepare monthly/annual results and performance reports


Requirements


	Experience in customer service is essential
	Proficient in English; Good knowledge of additional languages will be a definite plus
	Working knowledge of MS Office
	Tech savvy with knowledge of telephone equipment and relevant computer programs
	Knowledge of performance evaluation procedures
	Outstanding communication and negotiation abilities
	A results-oriented approach
	Excellent organizational and leadership skills
	Ability to work under pressure


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Sales Representative Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Fashion retail sector, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Sales Representative, you will be responsible for attending to walk-in customers, responding to customer inquiries across online platforms, and supporting daily sales activities to enhance customer experience and service delivery.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Attend to walk-in customers and provide accurate information on the company’s products and services
	Respond promptly to customer inquiries via social media, WhatsApp, and other communication channels
	Process customer transactions and support daily store operations efficiently
	Maintain proper records of customer interactions and daily sales activities
	Ensure excellent customer service and a positive in-store customer experience


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field
	1–2 years of experience in retail sales, customer service, or front desk operations
	Experience using POS systems and scanning tools is an added advantage
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced customer-facing environment


Salary
NGN 120,000 – 150,000 Monthly    

    

        Click here to Apply
